title: Genga
description: this mod adds geckolib mobs and items
body:
##  this mod adds
 
###  5 mobs

-Caseoh (giant boss aggresive towards everything)

-Sword shadow (mob with a sword aggresive towards player)

-Iron soldier (giant boss aggresive towards player,drops fireshard)

-Momotaro (japanese doll aggresive towards animals,drops brainwash)

-Shark (underwater fish aggresive towards animals and player) 

###  2 items

-FirePower (rechargable fireball launcher)

-BrainWash (makes nearby mobs go to a block that you click on)

## Recipies
### -Fire power (3 fire shards,1 lava bucket)
*you get the bucket back*

fire shards drop from Iron soldier

![FirePower recipy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723d389b7ed7d7ec00377db441e941c810387bf8.png)

## This mod requires Geckolib

![this mod requires Geckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/931b4c495e5675476ab08ebfab31380f2b5ba81a.png)
